component.name: JobDocs
component.summary: Manage blueprint files and customer job directories

description.p: JobDocs is a modular desktop tool for managing blueprint files and customer job directories. It supports file linking, ITAR compliance workflows, and comprehensive job tracking.

ul.li: Auto-generate sequential job and quote numbers
Single and bulk job creation (CSV import)
Blueprint file management with hard-link deduplication
Advanced search by customer, job number, description, or drawing number
History tracking for recent jobs and customers
